---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for aicite
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: risaavedraf
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or use case this feature would address. Why is this feature important?

## Proposed Solution

If you have a specific implementation in mind, describe it here. Include:
- API design or interface changes
- Configuration options
- Backward compatibility considerations

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references that help explain the feature request.
